article.title: UBER SDE - 2 (L4) - AWAITING INTERVIEWS
article.content: I was approached by recruiter & gave Phone screening round post which the feedback was good & had to move to the Coding Round (DSA & LLD) but it has been a week, & rounds are yet to be scheduled. Anyone in the same boat? for Uber?

post.content: Can you help with qs asked during phone screen please?\n
what did they ask you in screening round?

my interview happened last Friday, called HR told likely next rounds will be get to know this week . 

Did you got further contact from HR? Pls reply.
Hey,\noff the topic - Can you please share what kind of question were asked in phone screening, it will be really helpful.
yes. I was called for onsite after spamming the HR like 10 times.\ncan you tell me your questions they may ask same in onsites
